notes: v0.2.8: Effects rack is back. All 7 effects (Compressor, EQ, Distortion, Chorus, Flanger, Delay, Reverb) with lock-free bypass — when all effects are off, the audio path is bit-perfect identical to v0.1.x (zero added latency). Compressor, EQ, and Distortion add zero latency even when on. UI shows per-effect latency cost. Chorus base delay reduced 15ms → 8ms.
